title: Design canvas input handling with drag state machine for various interactions
purpose: Manages all mouse, touch, and gesture input on the design editor canvas, implementing a drag state machine for select, draw, move, pan, resize, rotate, marquee, pen, and text-select interactions.
module_context: Exports a React hook that sets up event listeners on a canvas element to handle various input interactions including mouse, touch, and gesture events for a design editor.

steps.content: Initialize drag state and last click tracking references.
Set up mouse event handlers for mousedown, mousemove, mouseup, mouseleave, and dblclick.
Set up touch event handlers for touchstart, touchmove, and touchend.
Set up gesture event handlers for gesturestart, gesturechange, and gestureend.
Set up wheel event handler for zooming and panning.
Set up context menu handler to show the context menu.
Attach all event listeners to the canvas element.
Return cleanup function to remove all event listeners when component unmounts.

methods.name: getCoords
methods.normalized_params: (e: MouseEvent): { sx: number; sy: number; cx: number; cy: number }

steps.content: Get the canvas element from the ref.
If canvas is not available, return default coordinates.
Calculate screen coordinates relative to canvas bounds.
Convert screen coordinates to canvas coordinates using store's screenToCanvas function.

methods.name: applyResize
methods.normalized_params: (d: DragResize, cx: number, cy: number, constrain: boolean): void

steps.content: Calculate the change in x and y coordinates from the drag start.
Update width and height based on the handle position and drag direction.
Apply aspect ratio constraints if the constrain flag is true.
Ensure width and height are positive values.
Update the node with the new dimensions and position.

methods.name: computeAutoLayoutIndicatorForFrame
methods.normalized_params: (parent: SceneNode, cx: number, cy: number): void

steps.content: Get the graph and store from refs.
Filter children of the parent node that are not absolute positioned and not selected.
Determine the insertion index based on the cursor position relative to child nodes.
Calculate the indicator position based on the insertion index.
Convert the filtered index to the real childIds index.
Set the layout insert indicator with calculated position and dimensions.
Clear the hovered node in the store.

Track multi-clicks for text selection behavior.

Handle node selection and prepare move operation.

Update hover highlight for nodes when not dragging.

Handle move operation when drag state is move.
Handle text selection when drag state is text-select.
Handle resize operation when drag state is resize.

If currently editing text, do nothing.
